hero.headline: Come home to your breath
hero.subtext: An intimate Yoga and Wellness studio in Meerut for unhurried practice. Small classes, considered teaching, and the quiet luxury of being truly looked after.

philosophy.intro: We are not a gym. We are a small, community- driven space for people who want depth over noise. Come as you are, leave more as yourself!

pillars.title: Breath
pillars.line: Every practice begins and ends with the breath. The bridge between body and mind. Let's cultivate awareness, one breath at a time.

pillars.title: Movement
pillars.line: Strong, slow, intentional. Movement that listens to your body, not the mirror, because every posture is a conversation with your body.

pillars.title: Stillness
pillars.line: The hardest and most rewarding part. A meditative space to pause, reflect, and simply be.

classes.name: Hatha
classes.desc: Slow and foundational. Alignment, breath and patience. Ideal if you are beginning.

classes.name: Vinyasa
classes.desc: A graceful flow linked to breath. Builds heat, strength and ease.

classes.name: Yin
classes.desc: Long, quiet holds that release what the week leaves behind.

classes.name: Pranayama
classes.desc: Preparatory and Advanced pranayama. The inner practice, taught with care and attention.

classes.name: Meditation
classes.desc: The journey inward. Learn to quiet the mind, deepen awareness, and carry that calm into everyday life.

classes.name: Shat- Kriyas
classes.desc: Ancient Yogic cleansing techniques that purify the body, restore balance, and prepare you for deeper breath, movement, and meditation.

classes.name: Mandala Workshops
classes.desc: A weekly creative pause. Explore the meditative art of mandalas to cultivate presence, patience and inner balance.

classes.name: Weekly featured workshops
classes.desc: Keep an eye on our website and Whatsapp for various curated workshops or masterclasses around headstand/ advanced pranayam/ guided meditation sessions, etc.

instructor.name: Snigdha
instructor.bio: Trained across Hatha, Vinyasa and Ashtanga traditions with over 500 hours of certifications in asanas and pranayama and a decade of personal practice. Having spent 4 years in the corporate sector as an Assistant Manager at the State Bank of India, I understand the pressure one goes through on an everyday basis. TULAA WELLNESS was created with the belief that lasting health and peace, and inner stillness should be accessible to everyone- not just those who can step away from busy lives. I founded Tulaa Wellness to offer the kind of space I always longed for: unhurried, intimate, and entirely focused on the person on the mat. I teach small groups so no one is ever just a face in the room, and help you integrate yoga, pranayama, and meditation into everyday living.

testimonials.quote: Tulaa doesn't feel like any regular fitness setup, it feels like a place built for genuine well- being. The Breathwork & pranayama sessions leave you feeling noticeably lighter and mentally refreshed after every class.
testimonials.name: Aryan Bhalla, Meerut

testimonials.quote: Everything about this studio is beautiful and thoughtful. The sessions are designed in such a way that if you take a class once, you will not be able to stop yourself from coming back for more, because that is how relieved I feel after each session. Truly one of its kind studio in Meerut. Highly reccommend.
testimonials.name: Divyansh B., Meerut

testimonials.quote: Practice here makes me feel super refreshed and also, this is the most personal studio I have found. The teaching has rare attention. Worth every minute.
testimonials.name: Ananya, Pallavpuram

pricing.name: Monthly
features: Inclusive of 20% discount from the original price of Rs. 2,500

pricing.name: Private
features: At the studio or your home

faq.q: I have never practised before. Is that alright?
faq.a: More than alright. Most of our students began with us. Start with any Hatha or Beginners class and we will guide you gently.
Only comfortable clothing and water. Mats and props are provided, though you are welcome to bring your own.
Tap any booking button to message us on WhatsApp. We will confirm your place and answer anything you wish to ask.
We are in Modipuram, Meerut. Tap the map below for directions, or message us and we will share the easiest way to reach us.
